rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemptionunder §11.13(b) has no relation to §11.254, which governs motor vehicle exemptions for mixed income-producing and personal use. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 11.254. MOTOR VEHICLE USED FOR PRODUCTION OF INCOME AND FOR PERSONAL ACTIVITIES.
_note: Rule text concerns an unrelated exemption provision; no conflict with proposed homestead exemption increase.
